hero_subtitle: SFTY helps exchange compliance teams connect STR alerts, case workflows, audit evidence and regulatory rules into a unified process for drafting and reviewing suspicious transaction reports.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling

trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_title: Suspicious transaction reviews depend on manual handoffs
problem_description: Compliance teams at exchanges face slow and fragmented workflows when suspicious transaction triggers are handled outside structured case management. This creates gaps in audit evidence, inconsistent reporting drafts, and challenges in maintaining regulatory review readiness.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY links suspicious transaction alerts, provider outputs, reviewer actions and regulatory rule triggers into one audit-ready workflow for exchanges drafting structured STR reports.
workflow_title: From alerts to structured STR reports
workflow_description: SFTY organizes suspicious transaction alerts into cases with documented reviews and evidence to prepare structured STR drafts and support regulatory reporting workflows.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Beyond alert overload. Structuring drafts and evidence
why_sfty_description: SFTY transforms fragmented STR alerts into structured case workflows with decision logs, evidence preservation, and audit-ready reporting tailored for exchange compliance teams.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY supports exchanges with structured STR workflows, evidence preservation and scalable deployment to meet audit readiness and bank due diligence demands.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance

ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for exchange compliance teams?
faq_1_answer: SFTY provides exchanges with a compliance control layer that connects provider outputs into structured workflows, enabling efficient STR case management, regulatory rule alignment and audit-ready reporting.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY support STR drafting workflows?
faq_2_answer: SFTY structures STR workflows by linking alerts, provider checks and transaction data into draft reports, supporting case creation, decision logging and reviewer collaboration within one platform.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit-ready evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves case history, decision logs and supporting evidence with audit-grade records, helping exchanges demonstrate compliance readiness and streamline internal or regulatory reviews.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing compliance tools?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY connects to multiple KYC, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers, sitting above them to connect data and deliver coordinated case and reporting workflows.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace KYC, KYT or reporting providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY does not replace existing providers but integrates their outputs into an operational compliance layer for enhanced visibility and structured decision making.
final_title: Structure exchange STR workflows with SFTY
final_description: Review how SFTY connects STR alerts, case management, audit evidence and regulatory rule updates into structured reporting workflows.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
